verses.text: Jakob tawh Egypt-ah a hong pai, amau' innkuan ciat tawh ahi Israel' tapate' minte
Reuben, Simeon, Levi, leh Judah
Issakhar, Zebulun, leh Benjamin
Dan leh Naftali, Gad leh Asher ahi hi
Jakob' suanlekhakte khempeuh mi sawmsagih hi a, Josef pen Egypt-ah na om khinzo hi
Tua ciangin Josef leh a sanggamte leh tua khangmi khempeuh si uh hi
Ahih hangin Israel' suanlekhakte pungin nakpi takin khang uh hi. Amaute tampi pha-in nakpi takin khang uh ahih manin Egypt gamah dim uh hi
Tu-in Josef a theilo kumpi thak khat Egypt gamah hong khang hi
Amah in a mipihte kiangah, “En un, Israel mite eite-a' dingin tam lua-in thahat lua uh hi
Amaute hong tam khading uh ahih manin ngaihsut siamna tawh amaute hih ni. Eite tungah gal hong om leh amaute in i galte pawlin eite hong do-in hih gam panin taikhia khading uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin nasepna tawh amaute a gimsak dingin amaute tungah nasem ukte koih uh hi. Israel mite in Faro-a' dingin van koihna Pithom leh Rameses khuapite lam uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute a kinenniam ciangin amaute tampi phazaw-in kizelthang zaw uh hi. Egypt mite in Israel mite kihta uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Israel mite a gim mahmahin na semsak uh a
buan leh leiseek tawh nasepna leh lo sungah nasep namkim khempeuh tawh amau' nuntakna haksa sak uh hi. Israel mite' sepna khempeuhah amaute in a gim mahmahin semsak uh hi
Tua ciangin Egypt kumpipa in Hebru mi nau a domsakte, khat' min Shifrah, adang khat' min Puah a kicite kiangah
“Hebru numeite nau domin, nausuahna tutphah tungah a tut ciangun, tapa ahih leh a naungek na that ding uh a, ahi zongin tanu ahih leh na nungtasak ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin naudomte in Pasian zahtak uh hi. Egypt kumpipa in amaute a thupiak bangin gamtalo uh a, nau pasalte nungtasak uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Egypt kumpipa in naudomte samin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin hih bangin gamta a, nau pasalte nungtasak na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi

Naudomte in Faro' kiangah, “Hebru numeite leh Egypt numeite a kibatlohna hang ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute thadim uh a, amau' kiangah naudomte a tun' ma-in amaute na suak khin pahpah uh hi,” na ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in naudomte limbawl hi. Mite khangin pawlcing semsem uh hi
Naudomte in Pasian zahtak uh ahih manin amah in amaute tungah suanlekhak a pia hi
Tua ciangin Faro in a mipihte khempeuh thu pia a, “Hebru mite sung panin tapa a suak khempeuh Nail gun sungah na khia ding uh a, ahi zongin tanu khempeuh na nungtasak ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
